name: Level Devil - NOT A Troll Game

detail.description:
BIG, BEAUTIFUL UPDATE

A nice, pleasant game with no surprises.
- 240+ levels that make you happy
- Local 2-player mode to share the love
- Beautifully rendered graphics that will make your heart sing
- You will never die
- Guaranteed good feelings as you play again and again
- Buzzsaws but they're nice buzzsaws
- Everyone LOVES the ending
- Secrets
detail.recentChanges: Made Part 3 slightly more survivable. Emphasis on slightly.
